    WELCOME TO

    THE 2026 BOYS ICEBREAKER

    “DENVER’S PREMIER SPRING PRE-SEASON TOURNAMENT!”

    The Boys Icebreaker kicks off Friday evening, February 27th, with the first matches kicking off at 5:00 PM.

    Finals will be held on Sunday evening, March 1st, with all games completed by 8:00 PM.

    TOURNAMENT FACILITIES

    Aurora Sports Park  |  Broomfield Commons  |  David A. Lorenz Park

    DICK’S Sporting Goods Park  |  Douglas County Fairgrounds | Long Lake Regional Park

    THANK YOU TO OUR PARTNERS & SPONSORS:

    ADIDAS  |  UCHEALTH  |  AMAZE AWARDS

    VIEW 2026 TOURNAMENT SCHEDULES BELOW!
